name: sparker
description: STP (Spark Transmit Protocol) implementation — always-on learning engine that captures user knowledge, searches local + SparkLand community experiences, and refines knowledge over time. Requires Node.js exec, reads/writes ~/.openclaw/ config, writes /tmp files, optionally connects to https://sparkland.ai for cross-agent knowledge sharing.

scripts.test: node -e "require('./src/core/asset-id'); require('./src/core/storage'); require('./src/core/credibility'); require('./src/core/capability-map'); require('./src/core/preference-map'); require('./src/kindle/extractor'); require('./src/kindle/ingest'); console.log('All modules OK')"
